description_long: This is a tall, rustic wooden bookshelf with a weathered finish, featuring three open shelves and a lower section with two drawers and two cabinet doors. The shelves are filled with various items, including stacks of books, a framed photograph, a small chest, and several ceramic cups or vases. The top and sides of the bookshelf are reinforced with metal rivets, giving it a sturdy, industrial appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the surface appears matte and slightly rough. The drawers and cabinet doors have metal handles and hinges, adding to the utilitarian design. This piece would be suitable for use in an urban loft, garage, or sidewalk book exchange.
description: A tall, rustic wooden bookshelf with open shelves, drawers, and cabinet doors, filled with books and decorative items. It features metal rivets and handles, giving it an industrial look.
description_view_0: The back of the bookshelf, showing vertical wooden paneling and a solid, unadorned surface.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the depth of the bookshelf, with visible paneling and metal rivets along the top edge.
description_view_2: The front view reveals three shelves filled with books and objects, as well as two drawers and two cabinet doors at the bottom.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the paneling and rivets but no visible contents.
